Package algorithm.gaaco

Class GaAcoPlanner

java.lang.Object
algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoPlanner
All Implemented Interfaces:
PathPlanner
public final class GaAcoPlanner extends Object implements PathPlanner
Stateless implementation of PathPlanner using a three-stage GA → ACO → LocalSearch fusion pipeline.

Stage 1 — Genetic Algorithm (global search)

The GA explores the route space through random initialisation, tournament selection, order crossover, and swap mutation over a fixed number of generations. A 2-opt pass is applied to the GA best route before it is handed to the ACO, eliminating any crossings produced during evolution.

Stage 2 — Ant Colony Optimisation (local refinement)

The ACO receives the 2-opt-cleaned GA route and uses it to seed the pheromone matrix. Subsequent ants explore guided by the pheromone trail and the precomputed inverse-distance heuristic over acoIterationCount iterations. An elitist deposit reinforces the best route found so far after each batch update.

Stage 3 — Local search (final polish)

The ACO best route is further improved by two complementary passes:
  1. 2-opt — eliminates any crossing edges that probabilistic ant construction may have re-introduced.
  2. Or-opt — relocates individual waypoints to cheaper positions; addresses structural defects that 2-opt cannot fix by segment reversal alone.

Statelessness guarantee

Each call to planRoute(java.util.List<domain.SensorNode>) creates fresh GeneticAlgorithm and AntColonyOptimization instances with a new Random source. No state is carried between calls; the planner may therefore be called concurrently from multiple threads without synchronisation.

Ownership model

A UAV (or any other caller) holds a PathPlanner reference pointing to this implementation. The planner receives the current sensor-node positions at each planning call, so it always works on up-to-date coordinates without any coupling to the simulation layer.

  • Constructor Details

    • GaAcoPlanner

      public GaAcoPlanner(GaAcoConfig config)
      Constructs a planner that will use the given algorithm configuration for every route-planning call.
      Parameters:
      config - algorithm parameters; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if config is null

  • Method Details

    • planRoute

      public Route planRoute(List<SensorNode> nodes)
      Plans the optimal route through the given sensor nodes using the GA → ACO → LocalSearch three-stage fusion algorithm.

      The planner creates fresh GA and ACO instances for this call, sharing a single Random source between them.

      The returned route is guaranteed to be at least as good as the GA's best output after 2-opt cleaning, because the ACO stage seeds from that route and can only improve on it, and the final local-search passes can only improve the ACO result further.

      Specified by:
      planRoute in interface PathPlanner
      Parameters:
      nodes - sensor nodes to visit; must not be null or empty; each node must have a unique ID
      Returns:
      best Route found by the fusion algorithm; never null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if nodes is null or empty

    • getConfig

      public GaAcoConfig getConfig()
      Returns the algorithm configuration used by this planner.
      Returns:
      algorithm config; never null
